name: neon-solaris-fps
description: A browser-based cyberpunk solarpunk FPS vertical slice built with Three.js.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/engine/input.js && node --check src/engine/math.js && node --check src/engine/behaviorTree.js && node --check src/engine/audio.js && node --check src/world/textures.js && node --check src/world/city.js && node --check src/systems/player.js && node --check src/systems/weapons.js && node --check src/systems/effects.js && node --check src/systems/enemies.js && node --check src/systems/traffic.js && node --check src/systems/vehicles.js && node --check src/systems/missions.js && node --check scripts/serve.mjs
